SORCERESS_CULTIST_BANTER: Pretender bird of a pretender god. When will you give up and die?
SORCERESS_BYRDONIS_BANTER: I don't suppose I can plead for solidarity?
SORCERESS_SCULPTOR_BANTER: Twice as large and three times more pathetic.
SORCERESS_OBSCURA_BANTER: Are you trying to fool me? It's almost charming.
SORCERESS_KIN_BANTER1: It's not too late to abandon your posts.
SORCERESS_KIN_BANTER2: Then I hope they're worth dying for.
SORCERESS_WATERFALL_BANTER: I suppose I'll find out if a waterfall can burn.
SORCERESS_AEONGLASS_BANTER: You do not control my fate!
SORCERESS_WRIGGLER_BANTER: No respect for a lady's privacy.
SORCERESS_KEY_FIGHT_BANTER: You should learn to take no for an answer.
SORCERESS_KEY_FIGHT_REPLY: You should learn to say yes!
SORCERESS_PUNCHERS_BANTER: I see you've put aside your differences.
SORCERESS_FAKE_MERCHANT_BANTER: I'm not offended by your deception. I'm offended by its mediocrity.
SORCERESS_FAKE_MERCHANT_REPLY: I'm offended by your stupid beak!
SORCERESS_THINK_NEED_TARGET: I need to aim this at a target.
